entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::cityobject_count
entries.docs:
Returns the total number of indexed `CityObjects`.

#### Errors

Returns an error if the count cannot be read from the index.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::cityobject_ref_page_after_record_id
entries.signature: pub fn cityobject_ref_page_after_record_id( &self, after_record_id: Option<i64>, limit: usize, ) -> Result<Vec<IndexedCityObjectRef>>
entries.docs:
Returns a page of `CityObject` refs ordered by `CityObject` record id.

Passing `None` starts from the first `CityObject`. Results use keyset
pagination and are stable for large scans.

#### Errors

Returns an error if the `SQLite` lookup fails or `limit` is zero.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::descendant_cityobject_refs
entries.docs:
Returns descendants of the given `CityObject` occurrence in deterministic order.

#### Errors

Returns an error if relationship traversal queries fail.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::feature_bounds_summary
entries.docs:
Returns aggregate package bounds and indexed feature counts.

#### Errors

Returns an error if the summary cannot be read from the index.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::get_packages
entries.docs:
Returns every distinct package containing a `CityObject` with `external_id`.

#### Errors

Returns an error if lookup or package reconstruction fails.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::get_packages_with_metadata
entries.signature: pub fn get_packages_with_metadata( &self, external_id: &str, ) -> Result<Vec<(Arc<Meta>, CityModel)>>
entries.docs:
Returns every distinct package containing `external_id` with its source metadata.

#### Errors

Returns an error if lookup, metadata loading, or package reconstruction fails.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::lookup_cityobject_refs
entries.docs:
Returns every indexed `CityObject` occurrence with the given external id.

#### Errors

Returns an error if the `SQLite` lookup fails.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::lookup_cityobject_refs_for_ids
entries.signature: pub fn lookup_cityobject_refs_for_ids<S: AsRef<str>>( &self, external_ids: &[S], ) -> Result<Vec<IndexedCityObjectRef>>
entries.docs:
Returns every indexed `CityObject` occurrence matching any external id.

Duplicate input ids are ignored. Results include all physical
occurrences ordered by `SQLite` `CityObject` record id.

#### Errors

Returns an error if the `SQLite` lookup fails.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::lookup_package_ref_by_record_id
entries.signature: pub fn lookup_package_ref_by_record_id( &self, record_id: i64, ) -> Result<Option<IndexedPackageRef>>
entries.docs:
Looks up a package ref by its `SQLite` package record id.

#### Errors

Returns an error if the `SQLite` lookup fails.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::metadata
entries.docs:
Returns cached metadata entries.

#### Errors

Returns an error if metadata lookup fails.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::open
entries.signature: pub fn open(layout: StorageLayout, index_path: &Path) -> Result<Self>
entries.docs:
Opens an index for the given storage layout.

#### Errors

Returns an error if the index backend cannot be created or the index
store cannot be opened.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::package_count
entries.docs:
Returns the total number of indexed packages.

#### Errors

Returns an error if the count cannot be read from the index.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::package_ref_page_after_record_id
entries.signature: pub fn package_ref_page_after_record_id( &self, after_record_id: Option<i64>, limit: usize, ) -> Result<Vec<IndexedPackageRef>>
entries.docs:
Returns a page of package refs ordered by package record id.

Passing `None` starts from the first package. Results use keyset
pagination and are stable for large scans.

#### Errors

Returns an error if the `SQLite` lookup fails or `limit` is zero.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::package_refs_for_cityobject
entries.docs:
Returns package refs containing the given `CityObject` occurrence.

#### Errors

Returns an error if the `SQLite` lookup fails.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::query_cityobject_refs
entries.docs:
Returns `CityObject` refs whose `CityObject` bbox intersects `bbox`.

#### Errors

Returns an error if the `SQLite` query fails.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::query_cityobject_refs_page
entries.signature: pub fn query_cityobject_refs_page( &self, bbox: &BBox, after_record_id: Option<i64>, limit: usize, ) -> Result<Vec<IndexedCityObjectRef>>
entries.docs:
Returns a page of `CityObject` refs whose `CityObject` bbox intersects `bbox`.

#### Errors

Returns an error if the `SQLite` query fails or `limit` is zero.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::query_package_models
entries.docs:
Returns decoded package models whose package bbox intersects `bbox`.

#### Errors

Returns an error if package lookup or reconstruction fails.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::query_package_refs
entries.docs:
Returns package refs whose package bbox intersects `bbox`.

This eager convenience method is implemented on top of paged keyset
queries. Prefer [`CityIndex::query_package_refs_page`] for large result
sets.

#### Errors

Returns an error if the `SQLite` query fails.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::query_package_refs_page
entries.signature: pub fn query_package_refs_page( &self, bbox: &BBox, after_package_id: Option<i64>, limit: usize, ) -> Result<Vec<IndexedPackageRef>>
entries.docs:
Returns a page of package refs whose package bbox intersects `bbox`.

#### Errors

Returns an error if the `SQLite` query fails or `limit` is zero.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::query_packages
entries.docs:
Returns decoded packages whose package bbox intersects `bbox`.

#### Errors

Returns an error if package lookup or reconstruction fails.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::read_cityobject_packages
entries.docs:
Reads every package containing the given `CityObject` occurrence.

#### Errors

Returns an error if lookup or package reconstruction fails.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::read_filtered_packages
entries.signature: pub fn read_filtered_packages( &self, packages: &[IndexedPackageRef], filter: &PackageFilter, ) -> Result<Vec<PackageFilterResult>>
entries.docs:
Reads and filters packages while preserving input order.

#### Errors

Returns an error if package reconstruction or filtering fails.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::read_package
entries.docs:
Reads one package as a valid `CityJSONFeature` model.

#### Errors

Returns an error if the package cannot be found, read, or reconstructed.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::read_package_by_record_id
entries.signature: pub fn read_package_by_record_id(&self, record_id: i64) -> Result<Option<IndexedPackage>>
entries.docs:
Reads a package by its `SQLite` package record id.

#### Errors

Returns an error if lookup or package reconstruction fails.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::read_packages
entries.docs:
Reads packages while preserving input order and duplicate refs.

#### Errors

Returns an error if any package cannot be found, read, or reconstructed.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::reindex
entries.docs:
Rebuilds the index from the configured backend.

#### Errors

Returns an error if backend scanning or index population fails.

entries.name: cityjson_index::CityIndex::source_count
entries.docs:
Returns the total number of indexed sources.

#### Errors

Returns an error if the count cannot be read from the index.

entries.name: cityjson_index::PackageFilter::apply
entries.docs:
Applies this package filter to one `CityJSONFeature` package.

Object-type selection keeps descendants of selected `CityObjects`. This
preserves common packages where a selected parent object, such as
`Building`, carries its renderable geometry on child objects.

#### Errors

Returns an error if the underlying `CityObject` or `LoD` selection fails.

entries.name: cityjson_index::PackageFilterReport::ensure_requested_lods_available
entries.docs:
Ensures every exact `LoD` requested by `filter` was available in the merged report.

#### Errors

Returns an error when a requested exact `LoD` is absent for a requested `CityObject` type.

entries.name: cityjson_index::ProfileRecorder::disabled
entries.signature: pub fn disabled( command: impl Into<String>, dataset_path: Option<PathBuf>, index_path: Option<PathBuf>, worker_count: Option<usize>, ) -> Self

entries.name: cityjson_index::ProfileRecorder::enabled
entries.signature: pub fn enabled( command: impl Into<String>, dataset_path: Option<PathBuf>, index_path: Option<PathBuf>, worker_count: Option<usize>, ) -> Result<Self>
entries.docs:
Creates an enabled recorder.

#### Errors

Returns an error if the process cannot read its Linux memory snapshot.

entries.name: cityjson_index::ProfileRecorder::finish
entries.signature: pub fn finish(self, success: bool, error: Option<String>) -> Result<Option<CommandProfile>>
entries.docs:
Finalizes the recorder and returns the complete profile payload.

#### Errors

Returns an error if final RSS sampling or timestamp capture fails.

entries.name: cityjson_index::ProfileRecorder::measure
entries.signature: pub fn measure<T>( &mut self, name: impl Into<String>, f: impl FnOnce() -> Result<T>, ) -> Result<T>
entries.docs:
Measures a stage and records its duration and RSS snapshot.

#### Errors

Returns an error if the wrapped operation fails or if RSS sampling
fails before or after the operation.

entries.name: cityjson_index::ProfileRecorder::set_dataset_path
entries.signature: pub fn set_dataset_path(&mut self, dataset_path: Option<PathBuf>)

entries.name: cityjson_index::ProfileRecorder::set_index_path
entries.signature: pub fn set_index_path(&mut self, index_path: Option<PathBuf>)

entries.name: cityjson_index::ProfileRecorder::set_worker_count
entries.signature: pub fn set_worker_count(&mut self, worker_count: Option<usize>)

entries.name: cityjson_index::ResolvedDataset::inspect
entries.docs:
Inspects the resolved dataset and its current index sidecar.

#### Errors

Returns an error if the dataset or index cannot be inspected.

entries.name: cityjson_index::ResolvedDataset::validate
entries.docs:
Validates the resolved dataset and returns a structured report.

#### Errors

Returns an error if the dataset or index cannot be inspected.

entries.name: cityjson_index::configured_worker_count
entries.docs:
Returns the configured index worker count.

#### Errors

Returns an error if `CJINDEX_WORKERS` is set to an invalid value.

entries.name: cityjson_index::resolve_dataset
entries.signature: pub fn resolve_dataset( dataset_dir: &Path, index_override: Option<PathBuf>, ) -> Result<ResolvedDataset>
entries.docs:
Resolves a dataset directory into one concrete storage layout plus the
effective sidecar index location.

#### Errors

Returns an error if the directory does not exist, no known layout matches,
or multiple layouts match.

entries.name: cityjson_lib::ops::reproject
entries.signature: pub fn reproject(mut model: CityModel, target_crs: &str) -> Result<CityModel>
entries.docs:
Reproject the main vertex pool into `target_crs`.

The input model is consumed. Only `vertices` are reprojected; template vertices and
geometry-instance transforms are preserved. `cityjson-lib` stores parsed vertices as
real-world coordinates, so any root transform is removed after projection because vertices
are returned in target real-world coordinates.

#### Errors

Returns an error when `metadata.referenceSystem` is absent or PROJ cannot transform a vertex.

entries.name: cityjson_lib::ops::select_cityobjects
